name: revit_create_fill_pattern
description: Creates a model fill pattern element and optionally applies it to a wall surface or cut face.

complex.description: Create complex pattern with grid lines (default false)

wall_id.description: Wall to apply the pattern to (optional)

apply_to.description: Which wall faces receive the pattern when wall_id is set

notes: Logic lives in PatternForm (FillPatternForm.cs); bypass dialog for MCP automation.
